messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The starvation alarm suppresses itself on a FAILED send — arm on delivered, never on attempted
What it solves: THE BUG, VERIFIED AGAINST THE CODE AS LANDED ON MAIN (not from the proposal's description).
How it works: A starvation lasting days raises one alarm, not one per tick (AMENDED: delivered, not raised)

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-345 - The starvation alarm suppresses itself on a FAILED send — arm on delivered, never on attempted is complete.
